title: The Weather in Praia do Sol
description: Weather vocabulary + the four seasons. Rains, storms, humid, windy. Plus IT'S construction for weather.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário de clima e estações. Regra-chave: em inglês usa-se IT + BE para clima ('It's raining' / 'It's hot'), nunca 'the weather is raining'.

scenes.subtitle_en: It's hot. It's raining. It's beautiful.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Tá calor. Tá chovendo. Tá lindo.

scenes.text_en:
In Praia do Sol the weather changes fast.
IN SUMMER it's HOT and HUMID. We SWEAT.
IN AUTUMN it's WINDY and COOL. The waves get big.
IN WINTER it RAINS almost every day. Cosmo HATES the rain.
IN SPRING it's SUNNY but mild. Perfect for surfing.
scenes.text_pt:
Em Praia do Sol o clima muda rápido.
NO VERÃO faz CALOR e é ÚMIDO. A gente SUA.
NO OUTONO é VENTOSO e FRESCO. As ondas crescem.
NO INVERNO CHOVE quase todo dia. O Cosmo ODEIA chuva.
NA PRIMAVERA é ENSOLARADO mas ameno. Perfeito pra surf.

scenes.title: Weather uses IT + BE
scenes.body_en: English says 'IT IS raining' / 'IT WAS cold'. Never 'the weather is raining' or 'the day is hot'. The subject 'it' has no translation — it's there because English needs a subject. Same for time: 'It's 3 o'clock.'
scenes.body_pt: Em inglês, clima usa 'IT + be': It's raining, It's hot. 'It' não tem tradução — só existe porque o inglês exige um sujeito. Igual para horas: 'It's 3 o'clock'.

examples.en: It's raining. It's cold. It was sunny yesterday.
examples.pt: Está chovendo. Tá frio. Estava ensolarado ontem.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: IT + BE for weather. 'It is hot'.

exercise.question: Complete: 'Yesterday ___ ___ (rain) all day.'
exercise.explanation: Past continuous with IT for ongoing weather.

exercise.question: Complete: "Yes, it is warm and ___."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "Yes, it is warm and sunny."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Prefiro verão.')
options: I prefer summer. I love the heat.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "I prefer summer. I love the heat."

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice weather we are having, isn't it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, it is warm and sunny.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do you prefer summer or winter?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I prefer summer. I love the heat.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I like winter. The cold is refreshing.
turns.pt: Gosto do inverno. O frio refresca.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is it going to rain tomorrow?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, the forecast says heavy rain.
turns.pt: Sim, a previsão diz chuva forte.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good idea. Next week it will be cold.
turns.pt: Boa ideia. Semana que vem vai esfriar.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Great. I need to wear my warm coat.

scenes.title: Listening story — The Weather in Praia do Sol
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Neighbor and a student. Weather vocabulary + the four seasons. Rains, storms, humid, windy. Plus IT'S construction for weather. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Neighbor
paragraphs.en: Nice weather we are having, isn't it?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, it is warm and sunny.

paragraphs.speaker: Neighbor
paragraphs.en: Do you prefer summer or winter?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I prefer summer. I love the heat.

paragraphs.speaker: Neighbor
paragraphs.en: I like winter. The cold is refreshing.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Is it going to rain tomorrow?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Neighbor. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "The Weather in Praia do Sol". Weather vocabulary + the four seasons. Rains, storms, humid, windy. Plus IT'S construction for weather. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "The Weather in Praia do Sol". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
The Weather in Praia do Sol
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'The Weather in Praia do Sol'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "The Weather in Praia do Sol".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: VOA Learning English · Everyday Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Vídeos curtos sobre gramática do dia a dia.
